title: Technology Stack | Logos
description: Modular by design. Storage, Messaging, Blockchain, and User Modules form the foundation for privacy-first decentralised applications.
heading: The Logos Technology Stack

sections.eyebrow: Open by design, open in spirit.
sections.headline: The Logos Technology Stack
sections.body: The Logos Technology Stack is a unified ecosystem of distinct modules. The entire stack is modular so developers can assemble their own Logos-based platform with a different selection of modules.

pillars.title: Storage
pillars.body: Codex-based content addressing with reproducible attestation and graceful client-side fallback.

pillars.title: Messaging
pillars.body: Waku peer-to-peer messaging that survives hostile networks and adversarial intermediaries.

pillars.title: Blockchain
pillars.body: Cryptarchia: a private proof-of-stake consensus where validator identities and stake amounts remain hidden.

pillars.title: User Modules
pillars.body: Wallet, chat, files, and explorer modules composing into the Logos App.

sections.networkingTitle:
The Networking Stack:
Discovery, Peering, and Mix-Net

sections.title: Install the Logos app.
sections.description: The Logos App is a complete distribution that bundles the kernel, the default modules, and UI packages into a usable product. It provides the primary user interface, hosting Simple Apps that let users interact with the various modules.

sections.heading: Use Cases
sections.subheading: We know today's systems are captured and brittle. We build alternatives to give people a choice. Build on Logos and serve your community.

cards.title: Attack-Resistant Public Registries
cards.description: Privacy-preserving blockchain for sovereign order and decentralised governance.

cards.title: Decentralised Archives
cards.description: Permanent, censorship-proof preservation of knowledge, culture, and history.

cards.title: Private Financial Networks
cards.description: Money that moves securely and freely, without surveillance or control.

cards.title: Community Governance
cards.description: Self-organising groups establish and enforce their own rules, with members engaging voluntarily.
